items.detail_excerpt: P okémon Day has arrived, and with it comes a new Pokémon Presents, hosted by Tsunekazu Ishihara, President and CEO of The Pokémon Company The presentation features and updates from throughout the world of Pokémon, including information about the upcoming video games _Pokémon Winds_ and _Pokémon Waves_, as well as updates on Pokémon Champions and _Pokémon Pokopia,_ the rerele… Additionally, there are updates about _Pokémon Legends: Z-A,_ Pokémon Trading Card Game Pocket, the Pokémon Trading Card Game, Pokémon GO, Pokémon UNITE, Pokémon Masters EX, Pokémon Sleep, and Pokémon Café Remix
